review_notes: The functions provided are generally applicable to the control CP-10(3) as they relate to system recovery and reconstitution. They ensure data integrity and availability, which are critical for recovery processes. However, the reasoning could be expanded to better articulate the connection between these functions and the control's intent. The naming conventions are followed correctly, and the functions map to real Kubernetes security controls.
title: System Recovery And Reconstitution - System recovery and reconstitution | compensating security controls [withdrawn
step1_reasoning: The control CP-10(3) focuses on system recovery and reconstitution, which can be mapped to ensuring data integrity and availability in Kubernetes. This involves configuring backups for etcd, enabling encryption to protect data at rest, ensuring audit logs are enabled for tracking changes, and applying pod security standards to prevent unauthorized access or configuration drift.
